case_title: EVANS, LEE VS UNITED AIR LINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY EVANS, LEE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC. $2,505.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.50 INTEREST, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,794.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO UNITED AIR LINES RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC.
